unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：爱死(iso)啦，在一个被隔离(isolation)的安静地方。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Conceal, don't feel, don't let them know
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：con(共同)+ceal(看作seal密封) -> 密封起来就是隐藏。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: v. 狂暴；肆虐 n. 盛怒
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：阿姨(r)在阁楼(age)里发怒(rage)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My soul is spiraling in frozen fractals all around
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：frac(打破，碎片)+tals -> 破裂成重复的几何图案 -> 分形。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: And one thought crystallizes like an icy blast
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：crystal(水晶/结晶)+lize(动词后缀) -> 结晶，具现化。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Not a footprint to be seen
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：foot(脚)+print(印记) -> 脚印。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The wind is howling like this swirling storm inside
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：h(看作椅子)+owl(猫头鹰) -> 坐在椅子上听猫头鹰咆哮。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The wind is howling like this swirling storm inside
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：swirl(旋转)+ing -> 旋转的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Years later, during her coronation ceremony to become Queen of Arendelle, her emotions get out of control.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：corona(王冠)+tion(名词后缀) -> 戴上王冠 of the coronation ceremony.

unit_vocabulary.meaning: v. 猛然关上；砰地关上
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Turn away and slam the door
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：死拉猫(slam)尾巴，它砰地把门关上。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's funny how some distance makes everything seem small
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：di(双)+stance(站立) -> 两个人站得开 -> 距离。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: To test the limits and break through
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：力麦特(limit) -> 力量的最高额度 -> 极限/限度。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: v. 螺旋上升/下降；盘旋
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My soul is spiraling in frozen fractals all around
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：spiral(螺旋)+ing -> 螺旋运动的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: And I'll rise like the break of dawn
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：打破(break)黑暗的黎明(dawn)时分。
